id: update-vrm-spring-bone
title: "Update VRM spring bone properties"
description: "Update physics properties of a specific spring bone chain for the specified VRM model."

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Update VRM spring bone properties"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/vrm/{entity_id}/spring-bones/{chain_id}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Update physics properties of a specific spring bone chain for the specified VRM model.

  as={"h2"}
